diagrams.title: Write-Through Flow
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing Write-Through policy: CPU write request goes to cache and main memory in parallel, both updated before completion

diagrams.title: Write-Back Flow
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing Write-Back policy: CPU write updates cache, dirty bit set, memory updated only on eviction

diagrams.title: Cache Line Structure with Dirty Bit
diagrams.description: Diagram showing cache line fields: Tag, Index, Offset, Valid Bit, Dirty Bit, and Data Block
diagrams.purpose: Understanding cache line organization and status flags

diagrams.title: Write Miss Handling Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of write-allocate vs no-write allocation policies on cache miss
